title: Why hire me
headline: Why teams trust me with ambitious AI and software work
searchDescription: I connect research, real-world systems, and product delivery without losing sight of usefulness.
aiDescription: I build AI systems across research, product engineering, real-time infrastructure, and creative technology.

At Google DeepMind Research at Virginia Tech, I contributed to SealQA, accepted to ICLR, and built evaluation pipelines spanning crawling, search-noise injection, retrieval, reranking, GPU-backed vLLM inference, and structured table generation.

At Marriott International, I shipped release-grade testing work for the Marriott Bonvoy app used by 237M+ members, built AI translation tooling with Azure OpenAI, and prototyped a computer-vision-driven mobile testing assistant.

Outside traditional internships, I have built creator analytics systems for a 400K-follower TikTok operation, real-time sensor workflows for the Cadillac Lyriq, and fast-moving multi-agent and RAG products in hackathons.
The through-line is that I like technically demanding work with real users, real constraints, and enough room to build something differentiated.
